name: wc
description: A plugin that counts lines, words, and characters in a document's pre-extracted text content using the Unix wc tool.

process.description: Count lines, words, and characters in the document's extracted text content.

filePath.description: The path to the source document.

textContent.description: Extracted text content from upstream plugins (e.g. markitdown).

ocrText.description: OCR-extracted text from upstream plugins (e.g. ocrmypdf).

lineCount.description: Number of lines in the extracted text.

wordCount.description: Number of words in the extracted text.

charCount.description: Number of characters in the extracted text.

installed.description: Check if the wc tool is available on the system.

install.description: Report that wc is part of GNU coreutils and requires no installation.
